referenceMaterials.title: Sample Final Exam
referenceMaterials.description: Sample final exam based on the previous semester’s paper: Part I (36 MCQ — mathematical methods), Part II (7 MCQ — Python as a mathematical tool), Part III (answer 2 of 4 long-answer questions). No computer needed.

referenceMaterials.title: Final Exam Study Guide
referenceMaterials.description: Exam blueprint, week-by-week learning outcomes checklist, formula sheet suggestions (calculus, models, probability, Python quick-reference), common traps, and 5 fully-worked exemplar problems.
